overall.description: Nighttime driving sequence in Cyberpunk 2077 along a winding coastal highway lined with palm trees and futuristic horizontal LED street lights. The wet asphalt reflects the amber illumination as the vehicle navigates through varying traffic density toward the neon-lit city skyline, passing a holographic billboard and NCPD police vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal highway with palm tree median and futuristic street lighting

events.description: white sports car overtakes on the right side at high speed
black sedan passes in the opposite direction on the left

agents.ego_description: cruising along the winding highway at moderate speed, navigating gentle left curves with city skyline visible ahead

notable_agents.action: white sports car overtaking rapidly on the right
black sedan traveling in the opposite lane

entered.detail: tall curved pole with horizontal LED bar emitting warm amber light
tall palm tree trunk with fronds silhouetted against the night sky
futuristic high-rise buildings with illuminated windows forming the city backdrop
metal guardrail with continuous orange LED lighting along the edge
full moon visible through the hazy night sky above the city

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark coastal highway at night, with the vehicle driving along a wet asphalt road lined with futuristic amber street lights. Palm trees silhouette against the sky as the city skyline glows in the distance. A white sports car overtakes on the right, followed by a black sedan passing in the opposite direction, while the guardrail's LED strips create streaks of orange light.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside highway with dense palm tree lining approaching commercial district

events.description: vehicle navigates a sharp left curve, shifting perspective of the roadside elements
large green holographic billboard becomes visible on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: navigating through a series of bends in the road, maintaining speed while approaching the commercial area with the holographic display

notable_agents.action: red sedan driving ahead in the same lane, maintaining distance
white car overtaking on the left side of the vehicle

entered.detail: large glowing green advertisement display showing a human figure, mounted on the roadside

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues along the winding highway, now surrounded by denser palm tree vegetation. The road curves sharply left, causing the city skyline and moon to exit the frame. A red sedan drives ahead while a white car overtakes on the left. Near the end of the segment, a bright green holographic billboard emerges on the right, marking the transition toward a more commercial zone.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway intersection with heavy traffic and police presence

events.description: NCPD police car appears parked on the right shoulder with emergency lights visible
blue pickup truck overtakes on the left, followed by increased traffic congestion

agents.ego_description: slowing down while navigating through denser traffic conditions, passing the police vehicle on the right shoulder

notable_agents.action: NCPD police car parked on the shoulder with flashing emergency lights
blue pickup truck overtaking quickly in the left lane

entered.detail: low-rise commercial structures with warm interior lighting visible through the palm trees

segments.scene_description: The final segment features increased traffic density as the vehicle approaches an intersection. An NCPD police car is visible on the right shoulder with emergency lighting, while a blue pickup truck overtakes on the left. The green holographic billboard passes out of view behind the vehicle, replaced by commercial building lights visible through the palm trees. The road continues to curve as the vehicle navigates through the congested area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive along a dark coastal highway that gradually transitions from a desolate stretch of road into a congested commercial zone. It begins on wet asphalt lined with amber street lights and silhouetted palm trees, where a white sports car and a black sedan pass by against the glow of a distant city skyline. As the road curves sharply left, the skyline and moon vanish from view, and the environment becomes denser with vegetation while a bright green holographic billboard emerges on the right. The scene then shifts toward an intersection with increased traffic density, passing an NCPD police car with flashing emergency lights and a blue pickup truck. Finally, the holographic billboard recedes as the vehicle navigates through the congested area, with the lights of commercial buildings appearing through the palm trees.
